nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Hmm? Who are you to intrude into Plum Manor? But... seeing you carry the aura of Go mastery, you're an interesting person.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: I am Hei Baizi, Second Master of Plum Manor. What I love most in life is studying Go books. The 'Blood-Vomiting Manual' is the world's greatest Go manual, which I've studied for years.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: I see you're also a Go lover. Why not study this 'Blood-Vomiting Manual' with me? If you can solve its mysteries, I'll teach you a secret technique.

options.text: Senior, could you share a Go proverb?

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: I've spent my entire life studying Go manuals - one could say I'm obsessed to the point of madness. But it's precisely this obsession that allowed me to comprehend the true meaning of Go.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Playing Go is like comprehending the Way - it requires complete devotion. Though the 'Blood-Vomiting Manual' is dangerous, the wisdom within is priceless.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Very well, come back when you're fully prepared. I'll be at Plum Manor, waiting anytime.

nodes.speaker: Hei Baizi
nodes.text: Go now and study the Way of Go well. I look forward to you solving the ultimate mystery of the 'Blood-Vomiting Manual' in the future!
